sectionSubtitle: A complete toolkit for modern translation workflows.

multiFormat.title: Multi-Format Support
multiFormat.description: Native support for JSON, iOS .strings, Android XML, and PO files.

collaboration.title: Real-time Collaboration
collaboration.description: Watch translations update instantly as your team types.

gitSync.title: Git Sync
gitSync.description: Two-way synchronization with your Git repositories.

search.title: Instant Search
search.description: Find any key or translation in milliseconds.

workflow.sectionTitle: Experience the next generation of translation management.

step1.title: Organization Setup
step1.description: Create your secure workspace and invite your team to start collaborating immediately.

step2.title: Project Creation
step2.description: Seamlessly set up projects for web, mobile, and desktop applications with built-in format support.

step3.title: Translation Workflow
step3.description: Manage keys and translations with an intuitive interface designed for speed and accuracy.

gitFlow.sectionSubtitle: Seamlessly sync translations with your repository. Pull, edit, and push without leaving MovaBase.

connect.title: Connect Repository
connect.description: Connect your Git repository with OAuth. Select the repo and branch that contain your translation files.

pull.title: Pull Translations
pull.description: Import existing translation files from your repo. MovaBase automatically parses JSON, .strings, XML, and PO formats.

edit.title: Edit with Confidence
edit.description: Make changes in our intuitive editor. Full history tracking means you can always roll back.

pr.title: Open Pull Request
pr.description: Push your changes and create a PR — all from MovaBase. Review diffs and merge when ready.
